programs.title: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programs.desc: Using her super-speed at a beach clean-up, Angela accidentally creates a giant whirlwind that threatens the event.

programs.title: Kangaroo Beach
programs.desc: What starts as a leisurely sailing trip for Frizzy, Spyke, Big Trev, and Aunty Bev takes a dangerous turn when their boat gets caught on the reef, and they find themselves racing against time!

programs.title: The Octonauts
programs.desc: Shellington and the Vegimals are on a mission to replant a mangrove forest.

programs.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programs.desc: Doc Ock's device controls the city's bats to steal things for her.

programs.title: Bluey
programs.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programs.title: Flower & Flour
programs.desc: While Flower, Penny, and Dirk head out for the day, Flour the cat sneaks off on his own mischievous adventure around the plaza.
